overall.description: First-person motorcycle ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077. The player navigates wet neon-lit streets at night, passing under overpasses and through intersections adorned with holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage. The scene features dynamic lighting reflections on wet asphalt and dense urban cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban street beneath overhead highway

events.description: makes a right turn at the intersection onto a commercial street

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through wet streets, slowing for the intersection and executing a right turn

entered.detail: elevated highway ramp with concrete supports spanning across the road
tall buildings with illuminated neon signage and advertisements
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: Riding through wet neon-lit streets at night beneath an overhead highway structure. The player approaches an intersection marked by yellow crosswalk stripes, then executes a right turn onto a commercial street lined with illuminated buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and signage

events.description: passing beneath the large 'Embers' neon sign structure overhead

agents.ego_description: cruising down the commercial street at moderate speed, following a red sports car ahead

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, being followed by ego

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with 'Embers' text suspended over the street
multi-story building with neon 'HOTEL' signage visible on the facade
ground floor commercial spaces with glowing storefront windows

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the commercial street following the right turn, with neon storefronts lining both sides. The player follows a red sports car ahead while approaching and passing beneath the prominent 'Embers' sign structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban canyon with overhead structural elements

events.description: enters covered underpass with overhead neon lighting and structural columns

agents.ego_description: following the red sports car through the covered urban canyon, maintaining steady speed

notable_agents.action: red sports car navigating through the underpass ahead of ego

entered.detail: solid overhead roadway or building structure creating a covered canyon effect
structural columns illuminated with blue and purple neon lighting
large holographic advertisements projected on the building walls

segments.scene_description: Entering a semi-covered urban canyon with overhead structural elements blocking the sky. The player follows the red car through this neon-lit corridor, passing holographic advertisements on the walls and illuminated structural pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with massive overhead holographic displays

events.description: exits covered underpass into wide open plaza with massive holographic billboards overhead

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the open plaza area beneath towering holographic advertisements

entered.detail: enormous overhead structure displaying multiple holographic advertisements and animations
large holographic sign displaying 'FERVID' with human figure imagery
tall commercial buildings framing the open plaza space

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered underpass into a vast open plaza dominated by massive overhead holographic billboards. The player accelerates through this space, passing beneath the 'Fervid' advertisement and other large-scale holographic displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown corporate district with prominent advertising structures

events.description: passing under the large 'Delamain' corporate sign structure

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed through downtown streets, navigating past oncoming traffic

notable_agents.action: oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane approaching from the distance

entered.detail: large overhead sign structure with 'DELAMAIN' text and corporate logo
tall modern glass and steel office buildings with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Continuing at high speed through the downtown corporate district, passing under the prominent 'Delamain' sign structure. The surroundings feature modern office towers and dense neon signage as the motorcycle navigates the multi-lane streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed ride through a neon-drenched metropolis, transitioning from enclosed underpasses to a vast, open corporate plaza. It begins beneath an overhead highway on wet, reflective streets, gliding through a yellow-striped intersection before turning right onto a commercial thoroughfare lined with glowing storefronts. As the camera follows a red sports car, the environment tightens into a semi-covered urban canyon where holographic advertisements and illuminated pillars flank the narrow corridor. The scene then expands abruptly as the rider emerges from the underpass into a massive open plaza dominated by towering holographic billboards and the prominent Fervid display. Finally, the momentum carries the camera into the heart of the corporate district, accelerating past modern office towers and beneath the Delamain sign amidst a dense forest of neon signage.
